strengths: 10+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops and open-source test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics roles
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TypeScript/Node/React delivery at Optilyz and re:cinq, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience. Testing rigor and architecture exposure are clear strengths. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js work and limited recent Kotlin/Java or broad cloud/Kubernetes evidence, though adaptable language background suggests these are bridgeable.
